sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n45283" key="eu)tekno/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">εὐτεκν-όω</orth>, <sense id="n45283.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">make people happy in their children</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">εἰς τέκνα</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">Cat.Cod.Astr.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.217</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
